document.title: CB Test Certificate JPTUV-170717 for Battery Recharger DEPS126002

sourceSummary.oneLine: IECEE CB Scheme CB Test Certificate for H&abyz Battery Recharger model DEPS126002 to IEC 62368-1:2023.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports safety conformity evidence for a Battery Recharger under the IECEE CB Scheme, with test report KR25K353 001 forming part of the certificate.
keyPoints: Product is identified as Battery Recharger with model/type reference DEPS126002.
Applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd in Korea, Republic of.
Factory is DAEAN ELECOM CO.,LTD. in Gwangmyeong-si, Korea, Republic of.
Ratings are input DC 15 V, 3 A, Class III and output DC 12.6 V, 1.3 A for Channel 1 and 2 each.
The sample was tested and found in conformity with IEC 62368-1:2023.
Certificate was issued by TÜV Rheinland Japan Ltd. with date 2025-03-12.
